untranslatable_reason: Signal requires valuation metrics (P/E, P/B, Shiller CAPE) and structural market anomalies (margin expansion, index concentration, derivative hedging imbalance) that are not available in the allowed indicator set. These are macro/fundamental indicators requiring external data sources beyond price/volume-based technical indicators. The 20-year historical mean and standard deviation calculations also require lookback windows beyond typical indicator scope.
translation_notes: This is a regime-detection signal focused on macro valuation extremes and market structure anomalies rather than price action. It cannot be translated using only price, volume, and technical indicators. Implementation would require: (1) P/E ratio data via fundamental data API, (2) margin debt levels from Federal Reserve, (3) index concentration metrics, (4) derivative positioning data. The signal is conceptually about mean reversion in valuations when multiple risks accumulate, but the specific triggers are not expressible with allowed indicators.
